arts.ttl: Arsenal handed MAJOR update as Florian Wirtz race heats up
arts.sum: While Arsenal could intensify their pursuit of Guler amid reports that Real Madrid may be tempted into a sale this summer, they are unlikely to sign Wirtz as he yearns for a transfer to Man City, according to Fichajes. Bayern Munich have reportedly expressed their interest in signing Real Madrid midfielder Arda Guler after admitting defeat in the race for Florian Wirtz ’s signature.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot: Liverpool's "regimental" but "genius" manager can complete 36-year Arsenal revenge mission
arts.sum: Arne Slot will be "right up there" with the best Liverpool managers if he can steer the Reds to Premier League glory, former Reds striker John Aldridge believes.

arts.ttl: 'Appalling' Arsenal superstar has 'not been good enough at all' this season as the Gunners look set to come up short in Premier League title race, claims ex-Tottenham striker
arts.sum: The Arsenal skipper has come in for criticism after his display in the Gunners' 1-0 home defeat by West Ham , which looks to have ended any hope of the side claiming the Premier League this term.

arts.ttl: Report: Nottingham Forest willing to offer £8m midfielder in swap deal for star praised by Jorginho
Jamie Carragher reveals major Arsenal fear amid Liverpool title race - 'This was a proper team' - football.london
arts.sum: With Mikel Arteta defiant over Arsenal's Premier League title ambitions, former Liverpool vice-captain Jamie Carragher is fearful that the manager is already beyond his peak with the Gunners. City have had their drop-off this season and the worry for Arsenal - and I take it back to when I played for Liverpool - under Arteta he’s been there for five years and every year you get better.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta Gives Honest Assessment of Arsenal's Premier League Title Hopes
arts.sum: Arsenal trail Liverpool by 11 points in the Premier League with just 12 games to go.

arts.ttl: Ticket info: PSV Eindhoven v Arsenal
arts.sum: Below is ticketing information for our UEFA Champions League round of 16 away fixture against PSV Eindhoven at the Philips Stadium on Tuesday, March 4 at 20:00 pm. If you fail to successfully scan the relevant away match ticket at the turnstile of the hosting club’s ground, resulting in the ticket not being used, we will remove any away loyalty points that have been credited to your membership account for the relevant game.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's true cost of mid-season Dubai trip revealed as Mikel Arteta plan backfires
arts.sum: Arsenal travelled to Dubai for a mid-season warm weather training camp for the second campaign in a row but it ended up making the Gunners' ongoing injury crisis even worse

arts.ttl: Arsenal player’s entourage expecting good proposal to arrive from European giants – Already in touch with enquiry
arts.sum: Juventus manager Thiago Motta is targeting a move for Arsenal midfielder Jorginho when his contract expires in the summer. That’s according to Bolavip Brasil, who report that Motta has asked Juventus to sign Jorginho to bolster his midfield options. arts.ttl: 'It'll be tough': Gary Neville drops fresh Nottingham Forest prediction ahead of crucial Arsenal and Man City clashes
